auth.title: Sign In
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your credentials to view your tickets.

auth.error_invalid: Invalid credentials. Please check your inputs.
auth.error_generic: Sign in failed. Please try again.

tickets.title: My Tickets
tickets.subtitle: All your support requests at a glance.

ticket.comments_empty: No messages yet. Write your notes below.
ticket.comment_placeholder: Your message to the support team…
ticket.closed_note: This ticket is closed. Please create a new ticket for further enquiries.

create.title: Create New Ticket
create.description: Describe your issue. Our support team will handle it as quickly as possible.
create.field_description_placeholder: Detailed description, error messages, affected systems…
